<!-- What does this change, and which sprint task, dragon, or idea does
it serve? Small vertical slices review fastest. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `scripts/check.sh` passes (fmt, tests, clippy)
- [ ] Archaeology updated where the change is substantive (task
      closed/amended, new risks recorded as dragons, consequential
      choices as decisions) — or the change is routine and needs none
- [ ] Commit messages follow `area: what changed` (lowercase,
      imperative)
- [ ] No invariant from `CLAUDE.md` is violated (files canonical, no
      hidden state, Git optional at the core)
